since_last: 56% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.37%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.75% · Gold +1.49% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 56% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.37%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.37%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +8.52%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +8.52%, AMAT +8.50%, LRCX +7.95%, KLAC +7.27%, MU +7.13%. Laggards: IBM -5.58%, NOW -4.86%, CRM -4.69%, WDAY -4.53%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.78% at $150.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
